channel.title: Bisk Monthly — The SimCluster Review
channel.description: A monthly deterministic review of what the SimCluster neighborhood shipped, said, and argued about — rolled up from the daily Bisk archive.

item.title: Bisk Monthly — June 2026
item.description:
30 editions · 7612 posts surveyed · 11 builders shipped this month.

Builders of the month: @minormobius.bsky.social (7 projects), @lastnpcalex.agency (4 projects), @dave.9000ish.uk (2 projects), @astrra.space (1 project), @cpaxton.bsky.social (1 project).

Chicken of the month: “holy shit bsky has a water sealant expert that predicted the reflecting pool failure mode perfectly” — @sneptech.bsky.social (♥2352).

Deepest delve: 10 levels, 6 voices — @tbabb.bsky.social.

Weather: avg sentiment +0.13, dominant mood trust; talking about fable, anthropic, llm, mythos, idk.

New shingles: adler.dev, astrra.space, avengingfem.me, brennan.computer, cameron.stream, carbonadoks.com, croissanthology.com, dollspace.gay, faz.ms, generativist.com, goose.art, gracekind.net, hailey.at, isolyth.dev, joetforhire.com, keytryer.net, lastnpcalex.agency, mimi10v3.com, mino.mobi, minomobi.com, niplav.site, nmk.wtf, philpax.me, samuel.fm, shibbi.me, shreyanjain.net, sincerely.cam, somewhere.systems, tautologer.com, tedunderwood.com, thebadcode.com, timfduffy.com, timkellogg.me, vgel.me, vibe-coded.com, yetanotheruseless.com.

item.title: Bisk Monthly — May 2026
item.description:
6 editions · 1583 posts surveyed · 0 builders shipped this month.

Chicken of the month: “The 'Google -> Goople -> propeller' pipeline” — @isolyth.dev (♥3267).

Deepest delve: 10 levels, 33 voices — @vibe-coded.com.

Weather: avg sentiment +0.155, dominant mood trust; talking about opus, norvid, anthropic, idk, fluoddity.
